steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills the phrase according to ______ trajectory. The word modeling is a gerund (verb acting as a noun), and a gerund must be preceded by a possessive to show who does the modeling. The passage refers to multiple astronomers and one object (2010 BL4), so the blank needs plural possessive astronomers' and singular possessive object's.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘astronomers modeling of the objects’: astronomers has no possessive apostrophe, so it cannot modify the gerund modeling. objects is plural but there is only one object (2010 BL4). Both errors. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘astronomer’s modeling of the object’s’: astronomer’s is singular possessive, but the passage implies multiple astronomers produced the model. object’s is correctly singular possessive. One error. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘astronomers’ modeling of the object’s’: astronomers’ is plural possessive (correct for multiple astronomers), and object’s is singular possessive (correct for one body). Both possessives are right. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘astronomers modeling of the object’s’: astronomers has no possessive apostrophe, so it cannot modify the gerund. object’s is correctly singular possessive, but the missing apostrophe on astronomers makes the phrase ungrammatical. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
